mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_salt, password_hash, created_at FROM tb_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_salt, password_hash, created_at FROM tb_account WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_account (username, password_salt, password_hash) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordSalt}, #{passwordHash})
